# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.AirAbsorptionLogFreqScaling property

When enabled, the filter cutoff interpolation uses a logarithmic frequency scale instead of linear. This produces a perceptually smoother sweep that better matches how we perceive pitch.

```csharp
public bool AirAbsorptionLogFreqScaling { get; set; }
```
